caption: cyStop or delay an eviction
heading: cyYou need to apply for help with your counterclaim fee
youNeedToApplyBeforeContinuing: cyYou need to apply for Help with Fees (opens in new tab) before you can continue with this counterclaim.
enterCourtFormNumber: cyEnter the court form number 'XXX' when asked. This will be one of the first questions when you apply for help with your fees.
afterYouHaveApplied: cyAfter you have applied you will receive a Help with Fees reference number. You should enter the reference number when you return to this counterclaim.
ifYouReceiveAnyBenefit: cyIf you receive any benefit that qualifies you for Help with Fees, you must include evidence of it when you apply online for Help with Fees.
ifYouHaveYourHWFReference: cyIf you have your Help with Fees reference number you can enter it here.
